examples: "There's a nice man, " he remarked to Carrie, as they returned to their cosey chamber. "A good friend of mine, too. "
She quite forgot Hurstwood 's presenceattimes, andlookedaway to homely farmhouses and cosey cottages in villages with wondering eyes.
In the late 1920s, Joseph Cosey stole a pay warrant of Franklin from the Library of Congress.
Cosey went on to forge autographs of Abraham Lincoln, George Washington, and other political and literary figures.
